prompt: A lavish fantasy gothic study interior, shown as a wide symmetrical room shot with no people present. In the center, place an ornate dark wooden writing desk with carved details, an open book, loose papers, an ink bottle, a quill, and exactly 2 small stacks of books on top, with a tall throne-like upholstered chair behind it in deep blue-gray velvet and intricate baroque trim. Overhead, include exactly 3 hanging light fixtures: 1 crystal chandelier with glowing candles in the center, 1 dark metal lantern on the upper left, and 1 warm amber pendant lamp on the upper right. On the left side of the room, add a tall carved bookshelf packed with books and curios, a small side table with papers and objects, and a tall arched stained-glass window casting cool blue light. On the right side, add an ornate carved architectural alcove or fireplace-like structure, a plush vintage sofa in dusty teal with 2 throw pillows, and a candelabra with lit candles. Use a richly decorated old mansion or magical library setting with stone walls, carved wood, antique furniture, and layered decorative clutter. The floor should be covered by a large patterned rug leading toward the desk. Light the scene with a dramatic mix of cool moonlit blue and glowing violet-magenta ambient haze, plus warm candlelight highlights, creating an enchanted, mysterious, cinematic atmosphere. Ultra-detailed, painterly 3D fantasy illustration, soft volumetric fog, shallow depth of field, luminous bloom, high detail textures, centered composition, elegant, whimsical, magical, storybook realism.
